ground_truth.description: Viewpoint overlooking Lisbon. Big red bridge (25 de Abril Bridge) visible in distance, might give away Lisbon without metadata. Architecture distinctive.
ground_truth.photographer_description: Viewpoint overlooking Lisbon. You can see the big red bridge in the distance, which it can hopefully get and might give away that it is Lisbon without metadata. The architecture should also give it away. Daytime, clear skies, summer.

details.description: Wide cityscape of Lisbon seen from a high hilltop viewpoint. In the foreground are red clay-tile rooftops and a black wrought-iron railing; above, the canopy of a pine tree frames a clear blue sky. The view looks across the dense historic center with Pombaline-era blocks and pastel façades arranged on a grid around open squares. Beyond the city, the Tagus River estuary is visible, and on the far horizon spans the red suspension Ponte 25 de Abril. On the left bank across the river, the tall pedestal and statue of Cristo Rei rise on a hill in Almada. Lighting is bright, midday sun with good visibility.

details.description: A panoramic daytime view over Lisbon from a high vantage point, showing a dense expanse of red-tiled roofs and white façades stretching toward the Tagus River. In the distance a suspension bridge spans the river, identifiable by its tall towers and cables. The sky is clear and blue, with bright sunlight highlighting the urban grid. Foreground elements include a decorative wrought-iron railing and the dark silhouette of overhanging pine branches, indicating the photo was taken from a terrace or viewpoint above the Alfama/São Jorge area.

details.description: Elevated daytime panorama over central Lisbon with dense terracotta rooftops descending toward the Tagus River. In the distance spans the red suspension 25 de Abril Bridge, and to the far left on the opposite bank stands the Cristo Rei statue on its tall pedestal in Almada. A wrought‑iron railing and the canopy of a pine tree frame the foreground, consistent with one of the Graça hill viewpoints. Clear blue sky and good visibility; squares and avenues of the Baixa area are visible below.

details.description: From a high terrace in Lisbon, a panoramic cityscape unfolds over a dense cluster of red-tiled rooftops. In the foreground, a dark wrought-iron railing and a tree branch frame the scene. The midground shows a mosaic of pastel and white buildings climbing towards the horizon. Across the Tagus River in the distance, a large suspension bridge spans the water. To the right, a hilltop castle overlooks the city. The sky is clear and blue, creating a wide, unobstructed view over Lisbon.

details.description: A high-angle, wide panoramic view of Lisbon, Portugal, taken on a sunny day with a clear blue sky. In the immediate foreground, dark green pine tree branches hang from the top left, framing the scene, while a black iron fence and terracotta rooftops are visible at the bottom. The mid-ground is a dense urban tapestry of white buildings with red-tiled roofs, characteristic of Lisbon's architecture. A prominent, long building with a reddish facade and many windows (Hospital de São José) dominates the right mid-ground, while a taller modern white building (Hotel Mundial) stands to the left near a public square (Praça Martim Moniz). In the background, the wide Tagus River stretches across the horizon, spanned by the red suspension 25 de Abril Bridge. On the distant south bank, the Cristo Rei statue stands with open arms atop a high pedestal.

details.description: A high-angle panoramic view of Lisbon, Portugal, taken from a high viewpoint. In the foreground, a black wrought iron fence and the red-tiled roofs of the Graça and Mouraria districts are visible. The midground shows a dense urban landscape with traditional Pombaline-style buildings, including a prominent large reddish-brown building which is the Hospital de São José. In the background, the Tagus River (Rio Tejo) stretches across the horizon, spanned by the 25 de Abril Bridge. On the far bank of the river in Almada, the Sanctuary of Christ the King (Cristo Rei) statue is clearly visible. The sky is a clear, pale blue, and pine tree branches frame the top of the image.

details.description: Panoramic cityscape over Lisbon with dense terracotta rooftops descending toward the Tagus River. In the distance a large red suspension bridge spans the river, and on the opposite bank a tall pedestal with a Christ statue stands prominently. The photo is taken from a high hilltop terrace with a black wrought‑iron railing visible at the right edge and a pine tree at left, looking southwest toward the river and bridge under clear daylight.

details.description: A densely built hillside city with a sea of red-tiled roofs and narrow streets, viewed from a higher vantage. In the distance across a river, a tall suspension bridge rises, its towers and cables faintly visible on the horizon. Foreground right shows a railing with circular patterns along a terrace, and left edge features the silhouette of a pine tree against a clear blue sky. The overall scene suggests a historic southern European city with a compact urban fabric and terracotta roofing.

details.description: A high-angle cityscape showing a densely built hillside urban area with red-tiled terra-cotta rooftops and a mix of mid-rise buildings along narrow streets. The right side of the frame is packed with facades in warm tones, while the left side features clear blue sky and a silhouette of trees. In the foreground on the right, a black iron railing with loops can be seen, suggesting a viewpoint or terrace. In the distance across a broad river or valley, a suspension bridge and towers hint at a major city. The overall orientation appears rotated, with the sky occupying the left side and the city cresting along the right edge.

entities.name: dense hillside urban district with red-tiled roofs
entities.notes: General description of the urban density and roof style

details.description: A panoramic photograph, rotated 90 degrees clockwise, depicting a high-angle view over the city of Lisbon, Portugal. When viewed upright, the image features the dense urban fabric of the city characterized by historic buildings with white facades and terracotta red tile roofs. In the background, the wide Tagus River (Rio Tejo) spans the horizon, crossed by the iconic red suspension bridge, the Ponte 25 de Abril. On the far bank of the river, the Cristo Rei monument is visible standing atop a hill. The left side of the frame (top in the rotated view) is framed by the dark, textured branches and needles of a stone pine tree. In the immediate foreground (bottom right in rotated view), a decorative black iron railing is partially visible.

details.description: A high-angle, wide-angle view of Lisbon, Portugal, looking southwest towards the Tagus River. The image is oriented vertically but depicts a horizontal landscape. In the foreground, the branches of a stone pine tree and a metal railing are visible, suggesting the photo was taken from an elevated viewpoint like a castle wall or miradouro. The midground is a dense cityscape of traditional buildings with terracotta-tiled roofs, typical of Lisbon's historic districts. In the far distance, the 25 de Abril Bridge spans the Tagus River, and the Sanctuary of Christ the King monument is visible on the southern bank in Almada. The lighting is bright and clear under a pale blue sky.
